name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
description: Premier public engineering and research institute known for strong computer science, electrical engineering, entrepreneurship, and global research collaborations.

reviews.headline: Excellent peer group and research exposure
reviews.body: The academic pace is intense, but the campus ecosystem makes it worth it. Labs, clubs, and internships create a strong learning loop.

reviews.headline: Top placements with demanding coursework
reviews.body: Placement support is strong, especially for core tech and analytics roles. Students should still be ready for a rigorous workload and self-driven projects.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi
description: Flagship public institute with strong engineering, design, management, and applied sciences programs plus deep industry and startup links in the NCR region.

reviews.headline: Strong academics and startup energy
reviews.body: The Delhi ecosystem helps with internships, hackathons, and founders building early-stage products. Faculty quality is excellent in flagship departments.

reviews.headline: Great exposure, competitive environment
reviews.body: Students get access to top recruiters and active technical societies. The culture is rewarding if you enjoy a fast and competitive academic setting.

name: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli
description: One of India’s leading NITs with balanced strength in engineering academics, hostels, technical festivals, and high-volume recruiter participation.

reviews.headline: Very dependable placements and campus life
reviews.body: The institute delivers solid outcomes across core and software roles. The campus is structured well and the alumni network is genuinely helpful.

reviews.headline: Excellent NIT option for engineering
reviews.body: Strong academics, good hostel culture, and active clubs make the overall experience balanced. Students should still plan carefully for branch-specific placement goals.

name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani
description: Highly regarded private university with flexible academic structure, strong placements, and a widely recognized student innovation and startup culture.

reviews.headline: Academic flexibility is a real advantage
reviews.body: The course structure gives students room to shape their path with electives, practice school, and dual-degree choices. Placements remain strong for software and electronics profiles.

reviews.headline: Strong brand and student culture
reviews.body: Clubs, festivals, and alumni access are excellent. The fee is higher than public institutions, but many students value the outcomes and flexibility.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology
description: Large private university with broad engineering intake, strong campus infrastructure, and wide recruiter participation across technology and service sectors.

reviews.headline: Good placement scale and infrastructure
reviews.body: Because the student intake is large, outcomes vary by specialization and preparation level. Students who stay consistent with projects and coding practice still do quite well.

reviews.headline: Lots of opportunities if you use them well
reviews.body: The campus has strong facilities and frequent recruiter visits. It works best for students who are proactive about skill-building and internships.

name: Delhi Technological University
description: Well-known Delhi engineering institution with strong employer recognition, active coding culture, and solid outcomes in software, consulting, and core engineering roles.

reviews.headline: Very strong for tech roles in Delhi
reviews.body: The branch reputation and location help with internships and placements. Student societies and hackathons are a big plus for software-focused peers.

reviews.headline: Industry exposure is one of the best parts
reviews.body: There is healthy recruiter interest and a large alumni base in product and engineering roles. Some departments are stronger than others, so branch choice matters.

name: National Law School of India University
description: India’s most recognized law school with strong academic intensity, legal research, corporate law placements, policy pathways, and national moot court visibility.

reviews.headline: Outstanding legal ecosystem
reviews.body: The peer quality, moots, journals, and internship network are exceptional. Students aiming for litigation, corporate law, or policy get strong exposure early.

reviews.headline: Demanding but very rewarding
reviews.body: It is academically intense and not an easy ride, but the reputation and alumni support are major strengths. Placement outcomes are strongest for students who stay active in research and internships.

name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi
description: India’s leading public medical institute and hospital network with highly competitive admissions, strong clinical exposure, and extensive research infrastructure.

reviews.headline: Top-tier clinical learning
reviews.body: Clinical exposure is unmatched and the patient load creates an intense but valuable training environment. Students need resilience because the schedule can be demanding.

reviews.headline: Best known for medicine and research
reviews.body: Faculty reputation, hospital access, and peer quality are all outstanding. It is one of the toughest places to get into, but the academic value is extremely high.

name: University of Hyderabad
description: Research-focused central university recognized for postgraduate education, sciences, humanities, social sciences, and a strong interdisciplinary academic culture.

reviews.headline: Excellent academic depth for postgraduates
reviews.body: The university is especially strong for students who care about research culture and academic freedom. Placements are selective by department, so program choice matters a lot.

reviews.headline: Great campus atmosphere and faculty access
reviews.body: The campus is spacious and the interdisciplinary environment is a real strength. Students targeting industry should combine coursework with internships and projects early.
